name: Banana Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the instant vanilla pudding, Eagle Brand milk, and room-temperature cream cheese until well combined.
2. In a separate bowl, gently fold in the remaining 1/2 cup of whipped cream cheese mixture with the Cool Whip.
3. Line a serving dish with vanilla wafers.
4. Layer the wafers, sliced bananas, and pudding mixture in the dish.
5. Spoon the reserved Cool Whip over the top of the layers.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
